title: Bellamy Mocks the Dreamers
description: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Nami. After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: You think you can BUY me?

dialogue.speaker: Bartender
dialogue.text: Ha! Sorry to say this but...

dialogue.speaker: Mock Town pirate
dialogue.text: Hahaha Hahaha Hahaha Hahaha hahaha hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The whole crew's a bag of loons!

summary: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
